definitions.seed: Inventory-shaped content that does not yet match an actual verified property.
definitions.sourced: A real property has been identified and is not yet registered with MyYado or Sharetribe.
definitions.pending-verification: A property name is known, but official site/contact details have not been confirmed cleanly.
definitions.manual-sourcing-cluster: A real supply pattern to source manually, not a single identified property.
definitions.inactive-benchmark: A verified property is brand-relevant but not currently active supply.
definitions.removed-from-active-supply: A property should not be pursued for active marketplace onboarding.
definitions.ota-direct-outreach: Property appears on Booking.com, Agoda, or a similar OTA. Use the OTA signal to confirm live supply, then contact the operator directly about MyYado onboarding.
definitions.concierge-first: Property is real but not clearly bookable through major OTAs. Try to arrange the stay manually as MyYado concierge, then convert the provider into a marketplace listing after trust is established.

acquisitionStrategy.classificationRule: If Booking.com or Agoda presence is confirmed, prioritize direct operator outreach. If OTA presence is missing or weak, use a concierge-first workflow only after a safe direct booking/contact path is confirmed.

primaryMotions.goal: Convert proven, bookable supply into registered MyYado listings.
primaryMotions.nextAction: Record OTA URL, find direct operator contact, send onboarding outreach, and avoid copying OTA photos or copy into MyYado.

primaryMotions.goal: Use real traveler demand to validate under-digitized properties and turn successful manual bookings into provider relationships.
primaryMotions.nextAction: Confirm availability and terms manually, explain the concierge role clearly to the traveler, complete the stay, then ask the provider to onboard.

priorityOutreachTiers.meaning: Best first 15 targets across markets. Work these before general sourcing because they combine brand fit, likely contactability, or strategic supply leverage.
Next 5 useful targets after the first wave. Keep warm or verify while tier 1 outreach is in motion.

otaPresenceTiers.meaning: Operator-supplied high probability that the property appears on Booking.com, Agoda, or both. Capture the actual OTA URL before outreach is treated as verified.
Operator-supplied mixed signal: may be Booking-only, Rakuten/Jalan-only, or limited OTA inventory. Verify channel presence before choosing direct outreach or concierge-first.
Operator-supplied low OTA or direct-only signal. Confirm a safe direct booking/contact path and prefer concierge-first before marketplace onboarding.

otaPresenceNotes: OTA presence is an operator-supplied probability layer, not verified evidence. Actual Booking.com, Agoda, Rakuten, Jalan, official site, and direct-contact URLs belong in the acquisition triage CSV once checked.
